ddls:
CREATE TABLE "local_authorities" (
  "authority_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each local authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the local authority is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Number of residents in the local authority */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the local authority in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of residents in the local authority */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "msoa_areas" (
  "msoa_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each MSOA */,
  "msoa_name" TEXT /* Name of the MSOA */,
  "authority_code" TEXT /* Reference to the local authority */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Number of residents in the MSOA */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the MSOA in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of residents in the MSOA */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msoa_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_msoa_areas_authority_code FOREIGN KEY ("authority_code") REFERENCES local_authorities ("authority_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property sale */,
  "msoa_code" TEXT /* Reference to the MSOA where the property is located */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "house_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "stamp_duty" INTEGER /* Stamp duty paid on the property sale */,
  "income_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated income of the property owner */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., house, flat, bungalow) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "property_size_sq_ft" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease) */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_msoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("msoa_code") REFERENCES msoa_areas ("msoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sale data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES property_sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market trend, tax collection) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry in a report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the data belongs to */,
  "data_content" TEXT /* Content of the data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., text, table, chart) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., property_sales, external) */,
  "data_generated_by" TEXT /* Tool or process that generated the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting ("report_id")
)
